decisions: Retained daily/2026-04-21.md — 6 days old, not yet past 7-day deletion threshold (eligible 04-28)
Skipped promotion across all tiers — all daily log entries are maintenance-only heartbeat/consolidation records with no user-generated content to promote
observations: Brain has been idle for 7 full days since bootstrap with zero user sessions — longest idle period so far
Daily log chain is complete (04-21 through 04-27) with 100% coverage, but all entries are consolidation metadata
The 3 reflections (04-21, 04-24, 04-27) correctly identify the idle state as the central gap
recommendations: Tomorrow's consolidation should delete daily/2026-04-21.md (7+ days old) — first real log deletion since bootstrap
If no user sessions occur by day 10, consider reducing consolidation verbosity to avoid generating purely operational reports
processImprovements: [self-critique] Seven days of purely operational consolidation reports with no user content — the maintenance pipeline is well-tested mechanically but completely untested for its primary purpose of capturing and promoting real knowledge. Every self-assessment criterion passes trivially.

[proposal] If brain reaches day 10 without user interaction, reduce consolidation reports to a single-line entry in TODAY.md rather than full report pair, to avoid commit noise. Rationale: full reports add no value when there's nothing to consolidate.
[blocked] Cannot test the promotion pipeline without actual user sessions — this is outside the agent's control.
